description_long: This is a retro-style microwave oven with a rectangular form factor and a muted green color scheme. The front features a large, black-tinted rectangular window set into the door, which is bordered by a metallic handle running horizontally across the upper part of the door. To the right of the door is a control panel with a prominent circular dial timer, surrounded by a black ring and labeled with white markings, as well as a vented section above and below the dial. The sides and top of the microwave are plain, with a slightly textured green finish, while the back is not visible. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functional elements such as the handle, window, and control panel.
description: A retro green microwave with a large front window, metallic handle, and a side control panel featuring a circular timer dial and vents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large black window, metallic handle, and the control panel with a circular dial and vents on the right.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain, textured green surface and the protruding metallic handle.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless, flat green surface with no visible controls or openings.
description_view_3: Right side view with a plain green surface and the metallic handle visible at the front edge.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, subtle logo is present on the lower left of the door, in white text, blending with the retro design.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is vertically aligned on the right side of the front face, featuring a single large circular dial timer in the center, with white markings and a black ring. Above and below the dial are rectangular vented sections. No digital display or additional buttons are visible.
attribute_door_handle_design: The door handle is a straight, metallic bar running horizontally across the upper portion of the door, slightly protruding for easy grip. It is simple, with a brushed metal finish and rounded ends.
attribute_vent_placement: Vents are located on the front panel, above and below the control dial, consisting of horizontal slits. No vents are visible on the sides or top.
attribute_window_presence: A large, rectangular, black-tinted window is present on the front door, occupying most of the door's surface.
